Divorce Digital Forensics Services | Varcoe Cybersecurity <

Digital Evidence for Family Law Proceedings

Modern relationships leave extensive digital trails across devices, cloud accounts, financial platforms, and communication apps. When these records become relevant to legal proceedings, proper forensic methodology is essential to ensure evidence is admissible, complete, and unaltered.

Forensic Services

  • Smartphone forensic imaging and analysis
  • Deleted text message and communication recovery
  • Hidden asset and cryptocurrency discovery
  • Dating app and social media activity analysis
  • Location history and timeline reconstruction
  • Cloud storage and backup analysis
  • Financial transaction tracing
  • Evidence preservation and chain of custody

Working with Your Attorney

We work directly with your family law attorney to understand what evidence is needed, ensure proper legal authority for examination, and produce reports that meet court standards. All findings are documented with chain of custody and expert testimony availability.

>

HERODigital forensics for family law proceedings. Device analysis, communication recovery, asset discovery, and evidence preservation for divorce and custody matters.

Digital Evidence for Family Law Proceedings

Modern relationships leave extensive digital trails across devices, cloud accounts, financial platforms, and communication apps. When these records become relevant to legal proceedings, proper forensic methodology is essential to ensure evidence is admissible, complete, and unaltered.

Forensic Services

  • Smartphone forensic imaging and analysis
  • Deleted text message and communication recovery
  • Hidden asset and cryptocurrency discovery
  • Dating app and social media activity analysis
  • Location history and timeline reconstruction
  • Cloud storage and backup analysis
  • Financial transaction tracing
  • Evidence preservation and chain of custody

Working with Your Attorney

We work directly with your family law attorney to understand what evidence is needed, ensure proper legal authority for examination, and produce reports that meet court standards. All findings are documented with chain of custody and expert testimony availability.

Evidence Types

  • Text Messages
  • Hidden Assets
  • Location Data
  • Social Media
  • Financial Records
  • Dating Apps

Modern relationships leave extensive digital trails across devices, cloud accounts, financial platforms, and communication apps. When these records become relevant to legal proceedings, proper forensic methodology is essential to ensure evidence is admissible, complete, and unaltered.

  • Smartphone forensic imaging and analysis
  • Deleted text message and communication recovery
  • Hidden asset and cryptocurrency discovery
